title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.3.2
body:

| [github.com/opencontainers/runc](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc) | `v1.3.1` -> `v1.3.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.3.1/v1.3.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the Dependency Dashboard for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/runc (github.com/opencontainers/runc)</summary>

### [`v1.3.2`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/releases/tag/v1.3.2): runc v1.3.2 -- "Ночь, улица, фонарь, аптека..."

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2)

This is the second patch release of the 1.3.z release series of runc.
It primarily includes some minor fixes for issues found in 1.3.1.

Changed:

- The conversion from cgroup v1 CPU shares to cgroup v2 CPU weight is
  improved to better fit default v1 and v2 values. ([#​4772](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4772), [#​4785](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4785), [#​4897](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4897))
- Dependency github.com/opencontainers/cgroups updated from v0.0.1 to
  v0.0.4. ([#​4897](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4897))

Fixed:

- runc state: fix occasional "cgroup.freeze: no such device" error.
  ([#​4798](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4798), [#​4808](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4808), [#​4897](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4897))
- Fixed integration test failure on ppc64, caused by 64K page size so the
  kernel was rounding memory limit to 64K. ([#​4841](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4841), [#​4895](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4895), [#​4893](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4893))

##### Static Linking Notices

The `runc` binary distributed with this release are *statically linked* with
the following [GNU LGPL-2.1][lgpl-2.1] licensed libraries, with `runc` acting
as a "work that uses the Library":

[lgpl-2.1]: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/lgpl-2.1.en.html

- [libseccomp](https://redirect.github.com/seccomp/libseccomp)

The versions of these libraries were not modified from their upstream versions,
but in order to comply with the LGPL-2.1 (§6(a)), we have attached the
complete source code for those libraries which (when combined with the attached
runc source code) may be used to exercise your rights under the LGPL-2.1.

However we strongly suggest that you make use of your distribution's packages
or download them from the authoritative upstream sources, especially since
these libraries are related to the security of your containers.

<hr>

Thanks to the following contributors who made this release possible:

- Aleksa Sarai <cyphar@cyphar.com>
- Jared Ledvina <jared.ledvina@datadoghq.com>
- Kir Kolyshkin <kolyshkin@gmail.com>
- Rodrigo Campos <rodrigoca@microsoft.com>

Signed-off-by: Kir Kolyshkin <kolyshkin@gmail.com>

</details>

---
